title: mentha × viridoides
intro: Mentha × viridoides, also known as viridiflora or green mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a cross between Mentha suaveolens and Mentha × villosa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-stimulating effects. The health benefits of Mentha × viridoides include relief from indigestion, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Mentha × viridoides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
